home.heroDesc: Connecting the world to Egypt's most ambitious infrastructure projects through creative editorial storytelling.

nac.title: New Administrative Capital
nac.desc: A smart city covering 700 sq km featuring Africa's tallest tower and a giant green park. The future seat of government and financial hub.
nac.details: The New Administrative Capital (NAC) is a large-scale project in Egypt that has been under construction since 2015. It represents a key pillar in the Egypt 2030 Vision, serving as a catalyst for economic growth, urban expansion, and global investment.

alamein.title: New Alamein City
alamein.desc: A modern coastal skyline featuring tall glass skyscrapers overlooking the Mediterranean sea.
alamein.details: New Alamein is one of the fourth generation cities being built in Egypt. It lies on the Mediterranean Sea, transforming the North Coast into a year-round urban center.

ras.title: Ras El Hekma
ras.desc: The crown jewel of Egypt's North Coast development, transforming the Mediterranean coastline into a luxury hub.
ras.details: Ras El Hekma is a major developmental project characterized by extensive waterfront infrastructure, luxury residential zones, and grand tourist resorts.

projects.exhibitDesc: Connect with decision-makers leading the development at the Egypt Infrastructure Expo 2026.

about.heroSubtitle: Engineering the future of a nation with unmatched ambition.
about.introDesc: Beyond the daily visual inspiration we draw from our heritage, we focus on all we create. To connect each line and piece to the Egyptian soul, used to create moments we are blessed to share with the world from this site.
about.legacyPara: A hand-drawn vision of intricate patterns and bright futures, these pieces invite you to interpret your own destiny from the details.
about.paradise: A piece of paradise in your home
about.aboutPara: EIE opened in 2026 as a concept hub to provide the latest infrastructure trends from around the globe under one roof at an affordable price.
about.author: — Louis Kahn

agenda.heroDesc: A carefully curated timeline of Egypt's most impactful infrastructure debates, panels, and project launches.
